title: アオハル杯3戦目・あともーちょっと！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aw, we ended in a tie! But I had a blast!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everyone running their hearts out made
me feel all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to the next race, Trainer! ♪
